_comment: Keyword grammar that routes a question to an advanced SQL shape (for the raw-SQL escape valve). Externalized 2026-06-02 from LlmDirectSqlEmitter.DetectAdvancedShape(); Arabic keywords added 2026-06-02. ORDER MATTERS — most-specific first; the first shape with a matching keyword (case-insensitive Contains) or regex rule wins. Keywords are BILINGUAL (English + Arabic); to add a language, translate and append to the arrays. Some English keywords carry trailing/leading spaces (e.g. 'rank ', ' and more than ') to avoid false hits — preserve them exactly. When NO keyword matches (a paraphrase, or a language with no keywords yet), the catalog falls back to EMBEDDING SIMILARITY (ITextEmbedder + VectorMath.Cosine) against each shape's keyword signature — so detection degrades to semantics, not nothing. Behavior contract: file ABSENT → emitter uses the byte-identical in-code English fallback; file PRESENT → this drives detection, with the embedding fallback for misses.
